name: Rental Property & Stock Options Return
description: Complete Elena Vasquez's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vasquez\. Save the completed return as 'elena_vasquez.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4036 (Rental Income) 2024 and CRA Guide T4037 (Capital Gains)
metadata.occupation: Software developer (SAP Canada) and rental property owner
metadata.key_complexity: Form T776 rental income with CCA loss limitations; T4 stock option benefit and deduction (Boxes 38/39); T3 eligible dividends; medical expenses for minor child; T778 child care expenses.
